title: The Worlds Most Terrifying Burger is an Eva Burger
display_title: The Worlds Most Terrifying Burger is an Eva Burger
wikitext:
[]: The World's Most Terrifying Burger is an Eva Burger             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Apr 19, 2013 11:54 pm [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2013-04-20/evangelion-9-patty-burger-comes-with-fork-of-longinus[/url] Wow Japan. Just wow. You're beating the US at it's own game.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Apr 20, 2013 12:56 am Evangelion. What else. If everyone in the world eats this at the same time, 3rd impact will begin. Seele, how naughty are you? (If you eat it alone, you'll just die due to a heart attack).

[]:             Quote Post by Paranoid » Sat Apr 20, 2013 6:51 am I couldn't care less about the burgers, but I'd love to have a whole bunch of those forks of longinus. They seem like fun.

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sat Apr 20, 2013 11:55 am Ew, I'm getting chest pains just from looking at that burger. The fork of Longinus is kind of cool, though!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Apr 20, 2013 12:33 pm Breakfast, lunch and dinner all in one. Whoever has Rei as their waifu in Japan would be going nuts over the prospect of winning that figure.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Apr 20, 2013 1:18 pm ... DAMN, Japan. Also has a Spear of Longinus fork?! ... SHUT UP, LET ME FLY TO Japan, AND TAKE MY MONEY. Nice way to promote though... strangely. "Why a 9 x 9 burger? It's a pun on the film's Japanese title: Evangelion Shin Gekijō-ban Q. (Nine is pronounced kyū in Japanese.) "

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Apr 20, 2013 1:23 pm Giant dinner + life-size Rei statue? Gimme.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Apr 20, 2013 7:41 pm This is a crime against beef. No human can eat that.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Apr 20, 2013 7:53 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Giant dinner + life-size Rei statue? Gimme.

[]:             Quote Post by CCri » Sat Apr 20, 2013 7:55 pm wait... so why do I need a fork to eat a burger? o_O;

[]:             Quote Post by Oenara » Sat Apr 20, 2013 11:05 pm The prize is a 158-centimeter (5-foot, 2-inch), life-size, articulated Rei figure.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Apr 20, 2013 11:35 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: There's definitely something of perverse in pairing 9 layers of meat with Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Apr 21, 2013 12:14 am I want that burger. I want that figure. I'd just mess it up by sleeping with it, though. The figure, not the burger. I mean literally sleeping, you perverts.

[]:             Quote Post by Elect G-Max » Sun Apr 21, 2013 5:23 pm To hell with the burger and the fork. I want teh Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by nervshatter » Sun Apr 21, 2013 9:13 pm Let me guess it's called the heart-stopper?

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Apr 22, 2013 9:13 am Being a Rei fan and loving fast food, I'd get the best of both worlds. That's a might tasty looking burger and I would solely go to Japan just to eat it. The Rei figure could watch.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Apr 22, 2013 10:43 am Dinner with waifu anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Apr 22, 2013 10:56 am AR-99 wrote: Dinner with waifu anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Apr 25, 2013 8:53 pm Is the contest Japan only?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Apr 26, 2013 3:04 pm If it were in America, I would have kicked this contest's ass so hard that it wouldn't be able to sit down for a week.
summary:
[]: The World's Most Terrifying Burger is an Eva Burger             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Apr 19, 2013 11:54 pm [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2013-04-20/evangelion-9-patty-burger-comes-with-fork-of-longinus[/url] Wow Japan. Just wow. You're beating the US at it's own game.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Apr 20, 2013 12:56 am Evangelion.
